pr.title: Non-record: LLaDA-MDLM Diffusion — val_var_bpb 1.1465 (first diffusion to beat AR baseline)

output.summary: MDLM masked diffusion runs an 11L bidirectional Transformer with log-linear noise, adaLN timesteps, and frozen visible logits evaluated by discrete ELBO.
techniques: MDLM log-linear noise with adaLN-conditioned masking
Discrete absorbing-mask ELBO eval with antithetic sampling
Frozen visible logits atop ReLU^2 bidirectional Transformer
